name: the-power-of-a-positive-no-save-the-deal-save-the-relationship-and-still-say-no
description: William Ury's guide to saying no powerfully and respectfully — the Yes-No-Yes formula for protecting your interests while preserving relationships.
useCase: Learn to say no firmly and respectfully using the Positive No framework — protect your interests without damaging relationships.
knownRisks: Some may find the formula too structured for emotional situations
May not work with abusive or manipulative individuals
